title: Binding
description: A mod that allows you to "bind" an Allay to a curse of binding book. I thought Curse of Binding needed a remake lol
body: A mod that allows you to "bind" an Allay to a curse of binding book. I thought Curse of Binding needed a remake lol. In order to use this, simply get a curse of binding enchantment book and right click on an allay with it. When you want to get it back out again, simply right click on the ground with your "Bound Book" and your allay will be back. In order to use the magnetism ability on your chestplate, give the allay a block and then put it into a curse of binding book, and then combine the book with a chestplate in an anvil.
